title: مرسوم بقانون رقم (8) لسنة 1989 بإصدار قانون محكمة التمييز
title_en: Decree No. (4) of 1989 approving the Cooperation Agreement between the Countries parties to the Charter of the Cooperation Council for the Arab States of the Gulf on the one part, and the European Economic Community on the other part, and its Annexes
